purpose: Owns all outbound NIP-17/59 gift-wrap logic and inbound dual-decode (kind-4 legacy + kind-1059 gift-wrap) for DM conversations. Exposes sealAndWrap, unwrapAndOpen, publishDirectMessage, and the dual-listening subscription wiring in ContactChat.tsx.

public_api.name: sealAndWrap
public_api.signature: (rumor: UnsignedRumor, recipientPubkey: string, selfPrivKeyHex: string): Promise<NostrEvent>
public_api.description: Produces a signed kind-1059 gift-wrap event using nostr-tools/nip59 wrapEvent. The outer event's created_at is randomized within [now-2days, now] per NIP-59. Ephemeral key per wrap is generated internally by wrapEvent.

public_api.name: unwrapAndOpen
public_api.description: Decrypts a kind-1059 gift-wrap event using nostr-tools/nip59 unwrapEvent. Throws on mismatched recipient key or broken seal. Returns the inner unsigned rumor.

public_api.name: publishDirectMessage
public_api.signature: (params: { ndk: NDK; privateKeyHex: string; peerPubkeyHex: string; content: string; attachments?: RoledAttachments }): Promise<string>
public_api.description: Rewritten to build a kind-14 rumor, call sealAndWrap, and publish the kind-1059 wrap via NDK rawPublish. External signature unchanged (D9b). Returns the inner rumor id.

public_api.name: signDirectMessage
public_api.signature: DEPRECATED — callers inside ContactChat.tsx are migrated to use the new flow.
public_api.description: Old NIP-04 sign helper. Kept as tombstone during migration if needed by sendDirectImageMessage chain; effectively replaced by the publishDirectMessage rewrite.

public_api.name: UnsignedRumor
public_api.signature: type UnsignedRumor = { kind: number; content: string; tags: string[][]; pubkey: string; created_at: number; id: string }
public_api.description: Seam S5 type for the inner unsigned rumor. Matches nostr-tools nip59 Rumor shape (UnsignedEvent + id, no sig).

owned_data: No persistent state owned by this module. DM message persistence is owned by lib/marmot/chatPersistence.ts.
dependencies_forbidden: app/src/components/* (lib must not import from components)
app/src/context/* (lib must not import from context)
events_emitted: kind-1059 gift-wrap event published to relay set
events_consumed: kind-4 (legacy NIP-04, inbound only, forever per D9a)
test_targets: app/tests/unit/directMessages/sealAndWrap.test.ts (NEW): round-trip, outer kind-1059, wrong-key throws, created_at bounds
app/tests/unit/directMessages.test.ts (EXTENDED): publishDirectMessage produces kind-1059, legacy NIP-04 decrypt regression

S5.sealAndWrap: (rumor: UnsignedRumor, recipientPubkey: string, selfPrivKeyHex: string) => Promise<NostrEvent>
invariants: sealAndWrap always produces kind-1059; never kind-4
unwrapAndOpen throws on wrong key or broken seal
publishDirectMessage external signature unchanged; wire format kind-1059 only
ContactChat.tsx subscribes to both kind-4 (legacy) and kind-1059 concurrently
Both paths dedup by inner-rumor id via appendMessage
